role: Principal Forward Deployed Engineer – Applied AI
headerTitle: Principal Forward Deployed Engineer  ·  Applied AI  ·  Technical Authority  ·  Production Agentic Systems
subjectText: Principal Forward Deployed Engineer – Applied AI — Titan AI (Remote) · $180K–$220K — Will Austin
intro: Titan AI’s Principal FDE is the technical authority on client engagements — architects end-to-end agentic systems, owns the build, represents Titan’s engineering credibility to client engineering teams. Four complete external FDE cycles, 14 live production AI endpoints, custom agentic orchestration built from first principles. Unconventional path with real production scars.
bullets: Technical authority across four complete external deployments — embed, own the architecture, build the system, hand off a documented production capability. Roofing contractor: 1.4M+ property records across three inconsistent CAD APIs, multi-stage normalization, fuzzy entity matching with confidence scoring, human review queue for low-confidence matches, downstream SMS outreach. Home services: 400+ email threads parsed and routed. Auto repair: work order and client communication system. OOH advertising: inventory and booking marketplace. Every engagement ended with a system the client operated without technical support.

End-to-end agentic system architecture — 14 live production endpoints: multi-model routing (Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus by task complexity and cost), tool-use architecture with MCP protocol, structured JSON output contracts (Zod validation on every endpoint), human-in-the-loop confirm-before-execute, observability logging per-request (model ID, prompt version, latency, raw output, correction signals), and structured fallback routing when agents drift. Context window management, memory strategies, and dependency graph design built in before deployment — not bolted on after.

Off-platform builds and bespoke integrations — Python data pipelines (1.4M+ property records, batch AI processing), REST API orchestration (100+ routes), IMAP email parsing (imapflow), Stripe webhooks, HubSpot API and Salesforce API in production CRM flows, Google OAuth2, Twilio and Sinch SMS, BullMQ + Redis async job processing, PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM. TypeScript for full-stack application delivery. Docker, PM2, Nginx on Linux VPS. Single production owner from architecture through handoff.

Client-facing technical leadership — former GM running P&L and 40–80 staff across Dallas and Las Vegas properties. Embedded with owners, ops leads, and crew managers under live operational pressure across four industries. Earned the ability to hold a room with business leads, push back on scope decisions with substance, and translate complex AI system behavior to non-technical operators. Every engagement closed with a playbook the client ran independently.
closingLine: The Titan AI Principal FDE model — lead the technical design, own off-platform builds, represent engineering credibility to client architects — is the exact engagement structure these four deployments were built around. Available immediately. TX-based, remote.
matchNotes: Stretch role. Strong: FDE technical ownership, end-to-end agentic architecture, off-platform builds, Python+TS, client authority, custom orchestration. Gaps: LangChain/LangGraph/DeepAgents specifically required at depth, banking/regulated industry 'strongly preferred', 'senior-level' bar implies 7+ years, pre-Series A risk. Equity upside justifies the application.
